profile.name: Mohamed Sathak Asfaan
profile.summary: MCA student and developer focused on Python, Flask, AI integrations, data processing, backend systems, and practical automation.
profile.education: MCA student at MEASI Institute of Information Technology.
profile.experience: Software and Data Intern at Smaart Healthcare, working on AI-assisted healthcare workflows, backend/data tasks, and automation.

skills.summary: Python, Flask, SQL, MongoDB, Pandas, REST APIs, data processing, AI voice assistant workflows, NLP intent classification, Git/GitHub, and DSA practice.

achievements: Built an AI nurse assistant that reduced manual patient intake effort.
Improved symptom collection time by around 35%.
Built VConnect for rural analytics across about 650,000 Indian village records.
Improved rural data retrieval speed by around 45%.
Reduced CSV/data preprocessing time by around 50% using optimized processing.

vconnect.name: VConnect
vconnect.summary: VConnect is a rural analytics dashboard that processed data for about 650,000 Indian villages and made rural information easier to search, analyze, and understand.
vconnect.problem: Rural data is often scattered, hard to search, and difficult for users to interpret quickly.
vconnect.role: Asfaan worked on data processing, dashboard logic, search improvements, and performance optimization.
vconnect.impact: Handled about 650,000 village records, improved retrieval speed by around 45%, and reduced preprocessing time by around 50%.

followups.search: The AI-driven search combined keyword matching with semantic-similarity ideas so users could search conceptually instead of only exact village or field names.
followups.scale: To scale VConnect further, Asfaan would add better indexing, caching, possible sharding, and a more robust vector-search layer.
followups.database: MongoDB was useful because village records can be flexible and document-like, making it easier to store changing rural data fields.

ai_nurse.name: AI Nurse Triage Voice Assistant
ai_nurse.summary: The AI Nurse Triage Voice Assistant is a healthcare automation project that handled initial patient intake through voice.
ai_nurse.problem: Nurses spend time collecting repeated symptom information before deciding whether a patient needs urgent human attention.
ai_nurse.role: Asfaan contributed to backend logic, symptom-intent handling, nurse escalation rules, and workflow automation.
challenges: knowing when to escalate to a nurse
keeping the conversation simple for patients
ai_nurse.impact: Helped reduce manual intake effort and improved symptom collection time by around 35%.

followups.escalation: The system escalated severe symptoms to a human nurse using rules and priority logic, so risky cases were not left only to automation.
followups.flask: Flask handled backend routes, request processing, and API responses between the voice layer and application logic.
followups.vapi: Vapi.ai provided the voice interaction layer while Flask handled the backend processing.

logisense.name: LogiSense 360
logisense.summary: LogiSense 360 is a subscription billing and management platform for customer plans, usage tracking, invoices, payment workflows, and service operations.
logisense.problem: Subscription businesses need reliable automation for plans, invoices, billing cycles, payment tracking, and service workflows.
logisense.role: Asfaan contributed to development tasks, backend workflow support, debugging, feature stability, and team collaboration.
logisense.impact: Helped make subscription, invoice, and service workflows more organized and less dependent on manual processing.

followups.workflow: The platform tracks subscriptions and usage, generates invoices, processes billing cycles, and manages customer operations centrally.
followups.role: Asfaan's role was development support, debugging, improving workflows, and helping ensure features integrated smoothly.
